slides.title: Apple business overview
slides.subtitle: Diligence-style company profile and assumed perimeter overview

slides.title: Apple operates an integrated ecosystem

perimeter.label: Assumed perimeter
perimeter.subLabel: Consolidated Apple business; no carve-outs assumed

overviewBody: Apple designs, manufactures, and sells consumer devices, software, and related services through an integrated hardware-and-platform model, with revenue led by branded device sales and iPhone historically the largest category.
Services monetizes the installed base through digital content, cloud, warranties, advertising, payment-related offerings, and subscriptions, creating recurring revenue alongside hardware cycles.

The model is vertically integrated: Apple controls product design, operating systems, key software layers, and significant elements of distribution, supporting ecosystem retention and premium pricing.
Performance depends on launch cadence, upgrade cycles, services attach rates, global supply-chain execution, and continued operation of Apple-controlled distribution and developer channels.
slides.note: Prepared from general knowledge only; no current-period web-sourced data included.
